post_form.pending_note: Your post will be reviewed by admin before going public.
post_form.tip_photo: Add real photos — great photos make your post stand out.
post_form.tip_location: Mention the place name and area clearly so readers can find it.
post_form.tip_feeling: Share your honest thoughts — that's what readers love most.
post_form.tip_cost: Include cost info and directions to the place.
post_form.tip_time: Suggest the best time to visit (morning / afternoon / season).
post_form.tip_block: Use the Block button in the toolbar to create Tips, Cost, and Directions sections.
post_form.review_note: Posts will be reviewed by admin before going public. Usually within 24–48 hours.

about.title: About · Chợ Cóc FKO
about.label: About
about.heading: What is
about.intro: A community for sharing food, recreation, and travel spots in Fukuoka for Vietnamese people.
about.s1_desc: We curate places in Fukuoka based on real community experiences — from restaurants and cafés to beaches, parks, and tourist spots, all in one place.
about.s2_desc: Anyone living, studying, or visiting Fukuoka can read and explore. Register a free account to share your own experiences.
about.s3_desc: Each post you write helps dozens of others find the right spot. The community grows stronger through genuine, firsthand sharing.
about.cta_sub: The community is waiting for your post.

writing_guide.title: Writing Guide · Chợ Cóc FKO
writing_guide.label: Guide
writing_guide.heading: Write a great post,
writing_guide.intro: Your post will help dozens of others find the right place. Here are tips for writing something truly useful.
writing_guide.s1_desc: Pick a specific place you've visited — a restaurant, café, beach, park... The more specific, the easier it is to read.
writing_guide.s2_desc: A bright, clear photo that captures the atmosphere will make your post stand out significantly.
writing_guide.s3_desc: How did you feel? What should people try? What did you love? This is what readers care about most.
writing_guide.s4_desc: Include practical info: price range, opening hours, how to get there — use Block buttons in the editor to create clean info boxes.
writing_guide.s5_title: 5. Posts are reviewed before going live
writing_guide.s5_desc: Your post will be reviewed by an admin before it appears publicly. This usually takes 24–48 hours. We keep your content as-is.

feedback_page.title: Feedback · Chợ Cóc FKO
feedback_page.label: Feedback
feedback_page.heading: Share your feedback
feedback_page.intro: Have a suggestion, idea, or want to report a bug? We're always listening and working to improve.
feedback_page.name: Your name
feedback_page.message_ph: Share your thoughts, suggestions, or any issues you've encountered...
feedback_page.error: Something went wrong, please try again.
feedback_page.success_desc: We've received your feedback and will read it carefully.

contact_page.title: Contact · Chợ Cóc FKO
contact_page.label: Contact
contact_page.heading: Get in touch
contact_page.intro: Chợ Cóc FKO is a Vietnamese community based in Fukuoka, Japan. You can reach us through the channels below.
contact_page.about_desc: A place where the Vietnamese community in Fukuoka shares food spots, activities, and city discoveries. All content comes from real member experiences.

policy_page.title: Policy · Chợ Cóc FKO
policy_page.label: Policy
policy_page.heading: Policies
policy_page.intro: Rules and policies that apply to all content on Chợ Cóc FKO.
policy_page.p1_body: All content must be honest, respectful of the community, and comply with the law. We do not accept spam, unclear advertising, or misleading information.
policy_page.p2_body: Only post photos you took yourself or have the right to use. Do not post images that violate others' privacy. Photos must accurately reflect the place being reviewed.
policy_page.p3_body: Each user is responsible for the content they post. Accounts that violate our guidelines may be suspended or removed without prior notice.
policy_page.p4_body: Your post will be reviewed by an admin before going public. We may decline posts that don't meet our quality standards or aren't relevant to Fukuoka.
policy_page.p5_body: Content on Chợ Cóc FKO is shared by community members and reflects personal opinions. Chợ Cóc FKO is not responsible for the accuracy of information.

delete_data_page.title: Delete User Data · Chợ Cóc FKO
delete_data_page.label: Privacy
delete_data_page.heading: How to delete your user data
delete_data_page.intro: At Chợ Cóc FKO, we respect your right to privacy and control over your personal data.
delete_data_page.s1_intro: When you sign in with Facebook or Google, we may store some basic information:
delete_data_page.s1_i5: Content you post on the site (posts, comments)
delete_data_page.s2_i1: Create and manage your user account
delete_data_page.s2_i3: Allow posting, commenting, and community interaction
delete_data_page.s2_i4: Improve your experience on the site
delete_data_page.s2_no_sell: We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
delete_data_page.s3_intro: If you want to delete your account or data associated with your Chợ Cóc FKO account, please send a deletion request email to:
delete_data_page.s3_e2: The email or account you used to sign in
delete_data_page.s3_e3: Your request to delete account / data
delete_data_page.s3_after: Once we receive your request, we will verify and process the data deletion within a reasonable time.
delete_data_page.warning: Once data is deleted, some content or account-related features may not be recoverable.
delete_data_page.footer_note: This page is provided as required by Meta/Facebook to comply with user data deletion policies.

privacy_policy.title: Privacy Policy · Chợ Cóc FKO
privacy_policy.description: Privacy Policy of Chợ Cóc FKO — how we collect, use, and protect your personal data.
privacy_policy.label: Privacy
privacy_policy.heading: Privacy
privacy_policy.sub: Applies to Chợ Cóc FKO · chococfko.com
privacy_policy.s1_body: This policy applies to all users who access and use the Chợ Cóc FKO website (chococfko.com). We are committed to protecting your privacy and personal data in accordance with applicable regulations.
privacy_policy.s2_body: When you sign in with Google or Facebook, we may receive and store basic information including: display name, email address, profile photo, and login account ID. We also store content you publish on the site such as posts, comments, and profile information you provide.
privacy_policy.s3_body: Collected data is used solely to: create and manage user accounts, display your profile, allow you to post and interact in the Chợ Cóc FKO community, and improve the quality and experience of the website.
privacy_policy.s4_title: We do not sell your data
privacy_policy.s4_body: Chợ Cóc FKO is committed to never selling, exchanging, or transferring users' personal data to any third party for commercial purposes.
privacy_policy.s5_body: We may use third-party services (such as Supabase for data storage, Google/Facebook for authentication) to operate the website. These parties are only given necessary information and must comply with our privacy standards.
privacy_policy.s6_body: Content shared by members reflects personal opinions. Posts must be honest, respectful of the community, and comply with the law. Admins may review, edit, or hide posts that don't meet our standards before they appear publicly.
privacy_policy.delete_body: If you want to delete your account or all data associated with your Chợ Cóc FKO account, please send an email to:
privacy_policy.delete_or: or see the detailed guide at
privacy_policy.contact_note: Questions about this policy? Contact us at
privacy_policy.footer_note: This policy applies from the website launch date. Any changes will be announced on this page.

confessions.subtitle: A place to share your stories, thoughts, and feelings anonymously with the FKO community.
confessions.contentPlaceholder: Share your story, thoughts, or feelings...

confessions.privacyTip: Please avoid sharing overly sensitive personal information. Confessions are reviewed by an admin before going public.

confessions.empty: No confessions yet. Be the first to share!
confessions.emptySubtitle: Be the first to share your story with the FKO community.
confessions.whatIsText: A place to share the things that are hard to say, anonymously. Posts are reviewed by an admin before going public.
confessions.rule2: Don't share overly sensitive personal information.
confessions.rule4: Confessions are reviewed before going public.
